updates.headline: Home and settling in
updates.publicUpdate: Denise has been home since about 3:00 PM and is settling in for recovery this afternoon.

updates.headline: Positive update from the surgeon
updates.publicUpdate: The surgery went well. We received a positive update from the surgeon, her vitals are stable, and everything is aligned well. She will head home after she meets recovery goals like walking and eating, and the nurse will go over the discharge instructions with us.
